mission.title: crossplane: Generic references design doc
mission.description:
### Description of your changes

The design doc for generic references which also addresses common data source problem.

Fixes https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/1770
Fixes https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/2099

I have:

- [x] Read and followed Crossplane's [contribution process].
- [x] Run `make reviewable` to ensure this PR is ready for review.
- [x] Added `backport release-x.y` labels to auto-backport this PR if necessary.

### How has this code been tested

N/A.

[contribution process]: https://git.io/fj2m9

resolution.summary:
New features:
- Allow user to define resource management policy to instruct the provider how to manage Kubernetes resources in a fine-grained manner.
- Allow user to define resource references for an Object as dependencies to retrieve values from dependent resources at runtime and guarantee the resource rendering in a specified order.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
